Arizona has no commercial (non-tribal) casinos; all casino gaming is Class III tribal gaming conducted under the Arizona Tribal-State Gaming Compacts. The NC State Lottery Commission's only NCAC chapter (24 NCAC 06 - Lottery Commission) applies, by its own text (24 NCAC 06A .0101), only to activity authorized by Articles 9 & 10 of the Act (sports wagering and pari-mutuel) - NOT the state-operated lottery. The lottery games/retailer rules are the Commission's own published rules on the official nclottery.com (e.g. "8.01 Retailer Rules and Regulations," individual game rules), which are not codified in NCAC. No NCAC administrative-rules citation exists for the state-operated lottery itself; flagged for human review (lottery is governed by statute Ch. 18C plus Commission-published game rules).
